title: Onboarding welcome
description: LibriVox Mobile welcome screen with the setup title, a carousel of classic audiobook covers, feature summary rows, and the Get started action.
best_use: Intro, onboarding, first-run experience, and free LibriVox audiobook messaging.
alt_text: LibriVox Mobile welcome screen with audiobook cover carousel and Get started button.

title: Onboarding welcome carousel
description: Welcome screen after the cover carousel moves, with Alice and Sherlock Holmes covers centered in the onboarding artwork row.
best_use: Alternate onboarding crop when the artwork composition needs brighter covers.
alt_text: LibriVox Mobile onboarding welcome screen with Alice and Sherlock Holmes covers.

title: Permissions setup
description: Permission setup screen explaining required app access plus optional notifications and nearby-device access for casting.
best_use: Trust, privacy, setup clarity, and explaining optional permissions.
alt_text: LibriVox Mobile permissions setup screen with optional notifications and nearby-device access.

title: Language setup
description: Language setup screen where users choose audiobook browsing languages during onboarding.
best_use: Personalization, setup, and catalog language preference messaging.
alt_text: LibriVox Mobile language setup screen with audiobook language choices.

title: Home featured
description: Home screen with the LibriVox title, featured audiobook rows, cover cards, share controls, and bottom navigation.
best_use: Browse and discovery hero images, home screen preview, and catalog browsing sections.
alt_text: LibriVox Mobile home screen showing featured audiobook covers and bottom navigation.

title: Home continue listening
description: Home screen scrolled to Continue listening, with The Jungle and other recent books visible.
best_use: Returning-listener story, progress and resume listening, and library continuity.
alt_text: LibriVox Mobile home screen focused on Continue listening with The Jungle visible.

title: Home alternate
description: Alternate home screen capture with a different set of visible books and browsing rows.
best_use: Backup home composition for website cards, collages, or alternate store artwork.
alt_text: Alternate LibriVox Mobile home screen with audiobook rows.

title: Author search
description: Search and discover screen showing author-oriented results and catalog browsing controls.
best_use: Search by author, discoverability, and finding public-domain audiobooks.
alt_text: LibriVox Mobile search screen showing author-based audiobook results.

title: Book detail
description: Book detail page with cover art, book metadata, listening actions, and chapter-related content.
best_use: Book preview, deciding what to listen to, and details before playback.
alt_text: LibriVox Mobile book detail page with cover art, book information, and listening actions.

title: Book chapter view
description: Book detail page focused on the chapter list and per-chapter actions.
best_use: Chapter navigation, long audiobook structure, and jump-to-section messaging.
alt_text: LibriVox Mobile book detail screen showing audiobook chapters.

title: Book chapter view alternate
description: Alternate book detail and chapter-list capture with a different visible position.
best_use: Backup chapter composition for screenshots or generated store art.
alt_text: Alternate LibriVox Mobile chapter list screen.

title: Now playing
description: Full now-playing screen with large cover art, title and chapter context, playback progress, and transport controls.
best_use: Core listening experience, player controls, and Listen anywhere messaging.
alt_text: LibriVox Mobile now-playing screen with audiobook cover art and playback controls.

title: Player chapters panel
description: Now-playing screen with the chapters panel open above the player.
best_use: Switching chapters while listening and in-player navigation.
alt_text: LibriVox Mobile player with chapters panel open.

title: Bookmark notes
description: Bookmark notes panel where the listener can save a note tied to the current playback position.
best_use: Bookmarks, notes, and remembering important moments in an audiobook.
alt_text: LibriVox Mobile bookmark notes panel in the audiobook player.

title: Playback speed
description: Playback speed control sheet opened from the player controls.
best_use: Speed control and personalized listening pace.
alt_text: LibriVox Mobile playback speed control sheet.

title: Sleep timer
description: Sleep timer sheet with timed listening options.
best_use: Bedtime listening, auto-stop, and quiet listening features.
alt_text: LibriVox Mobile sleep timer control sheet.

title: Cast sheet
description: Cast route sheet opened from the player, showing current playback and route controls.
best_use: Casting feature, nearby speaker or TV listening, and route selection.
alt_text: LibriVox Mobile Cast route sheet opened from the player.

title: Cast searching
description: Cast route sheet while searching for nearby devices, with this device selected as the current output.
best_use: Cast availability, searching for devices, and local playback fallback.
alt_text: LibriVox Mobile Cast sheet searching for nearby devices.

title: Cast device list
description: Cast route sheet with nearby devices listed, including display, speaker, and TV targets.
best_use: Cast device selection and listening on speakers or TVs.
alt_text: LibriVox Mobile Cast sheet listing nearby display, speaker, and TV devices.

title: Cast alternate
description: Alternate Cast-focused capture for future website or publishing compositions.
best_use: Backup Cast source image for website sections, store screenshots, or feature collages.
alt_text: Alternate LibriVox Mobile Cast feature screen.
